Off Calendar May-12-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Patty Dowling.
Plaintiff, DHS Associates, LLC., represented by counsel, William C. Wilka.
Based on evidence received, the Court orders Quiet Title as to the subject property as described in the claim and the judgment.
Order signed in open court.
